Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Request For Admission From And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maria Christenson, Plaintiff In Propria Persona appearing telephonically
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: Plaintiff telephones and admitted that she had failed to notify defendant Java Beach Cafe that she wanted a hearing of her motion.
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF MARIA CHRISTENSON'S Motion For Order Compelling Answers To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Request For Admission From And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. The court denies plaintiff's motion in its entirety. JUDGE WALLACE P. DOUGLASS. NOT REPORTED.
